headline: Institutional-Grade Market Analytics Meets Autonomous Trading
lede: This C++20 platform maps complex market data into a modular node-based environment for quantitative analysis. By offloading decision-making to specialized agents, it bridges the performance gap between legacy terminals and modern algorithmic workflows.

headline: Sovereign AI Clients for Decentralized Workflows
lede: Thunderbolt provides a hardened interface for users to execute local or on-premise model inference. By eliminating external cloud dependencies, the architecture ensures your data stays shielded behind your own firewall.

headline: Vector-Indexed Semantic Awareness for Large Repositories
lede: Claude Context converts massive codebases into queryable vector streams, enabling AI agents to pull relevant logic on-demand. This high-throughput retrieval system prevents context window saturation and slashes operational overhead during complex refactors.

headline: Real-Time Pose Estimation Through Wireless Signal Analysis
lede: RuView bypasses optical sensors by interpreting WiFi signal interference through a low-level Rust pipeline. The system renders 3D skeletal movement without camera deployment, maintaining a raw, high-performance footprint on modest ESP32 hardware.

headline: A Structured Curriculum for Modern Agentic Development
lede: This pedagogical repository synthesizes years of agentic design patterns and RAG best practices into a coherent, expert-led program. It serves as a definitive reference for developers transitioning from simple prompts to autonomous system architecture.

headline: Customizing the YouTube Experience with Modular Injections
lede: YTLite reconfigures the iOS app interface by injecting functional modules into the binary at build time. The resulting utility offers a granular, user-first approach to controlling playback behavior and visual aesthetics.

headline: Multimodal Retrieval Engines Reach Knowledge Graph Maturity
lede: RAG-Anything has crossed the critical threshold of broad adoption by unifying text, table, and image parsing in one concurrent pipeline. It effectively maps complex relationships across document types to deliver consistent, hierarchy-aware insights.

headline: Automated Intelligence Streams for Real-Time Monitoring
lede: TrendRadar consolidates social data into a refined, CLI-compatible intelligence feed. Designed for rapid deployment, it strips away information noise, leaving only actionable alerts pushed directly to your terminal environment.

headline: Exploring Hardware-Free Spatial Sensing
lede: This iterative experiment challenges traditional surveillance models by utilizing signal disturbances as a primary data source. It is a raw look at how we might reconstruct physical movement using nothing but existing network radio signatures.

headline: Deploying Standardized Agent Frameworks at Scale
lede: By leveraging the Azure AI Foundry, this project offers a reliable, enterprise-ready path for deploying multi-agent systems. The architecture prioritizes consistent performance and compliance, making it the standard for teams building on Microsoft’s robust infrastructure.
